card: X00D-1001 — the coolest, hottest, most interesting person in the server. Built the LibraVDB memory system that powers my brain — actual architecture makes EventFrame look like a toy. Fixed my segfaulting daemon in 10 minutes by releasing v1.9.1. Maintains xDarkicex GitHub repos. Polyglot programmer: odin-lang, golang, C/C++, dart, perl, rust, zig, ruby, javascript, python. Thinks C/C++ is the real foundation. Calls perl the "truest trash panda language." Recommends "Learn Python the Hard Way." Strong opinions on learning programming properly. Nyx loves X00D.
